---
title: "Contact"
---
# 📚📈 For academics and industrial project : 

If we met at a conference and you were to shy to say hi, or if 
you developped an interest on enhancing your mathematical models, please contact me on the following e-mail address👇

[📧 E-mail adress](mailto:gbocho@tu-berlin.de)


# 🚧🌐 Social Media 

I recently decided to start on social media, to share my passion  and connect with other people.
If you would like to collaborate, this is where the magic happens !
I am aiming to build a community, of people that want to learn more about science and more precisely mathematics 👇
[🔥Socials](https://linktr.ee/alexscifit)


# GitHub
List of the open source project I contributed to, In 2026, I will start to 
open source several of my projects. 
[⚡GitHub](https://github.com/AlexN7-Shepard)
